summary: SkiaSharp does not expose GetVkImageInfo() or SetVkImageLayout() on GRBackendRenderTarget/GRBackendTexture, making it impossible to correctly synchronize Vulkan image layout state between SkiaSharp and external Vulkan renderers.

stepsToReproduce: Create a GRBackendRenderTarget with a GRVkImageInfo
Create an SKSurface from the render target
After Skia renders, attempt to read back the current VkImageLayout to know what layout Skia left the VkImage in
Observe: no GetVkImageInfo() method exists on GRBackendRenderTarget
reproEvidence.environmentDetails: Vulkan interop scenario; any platform with Vulkan support

repoLinks.description: Reporter's patch adding C API bindings for gr_backendrendertarget_get_vk_imageinfo and gr_backendrendertarget_set_vk_imagelayout, plus C# P/Invoke wrapper
Related issue: Vulkan GRContext creation failure during Vulkan interop

versionAnalysis.relevanceReason: The C# bindings for GRBackendRenderTarget still lack GetVkImageInfo() and SetVkImageLayout() in the current codebase.

analysis.summary: SkiaSharp's GRBackendRenderTarget and GRBackendTexture bindings expose GL equivalents (GetGlFramebufferInfo, GetGlTextureInfo) but not Vulkan equivalents (GetVkImageInfo, SetVkImageLayout). The upstream Skia C++ API provides GrBackendRenderTarget::getVkImageInfo() and setVkImageLayout(); these must be wrapped in the C API shim and then exposed in C# to support correct Vulkan image layout synchronization.

codeInvestigation.finding: GRBackendRenderTarget exposes GetGlFramebufferInfo() for OpenGL but has no GetVkImageInfo() or SetVkImageLayout() methods. The only Vulkan entry point is the constructor accepting GRVkImageInfo.
GRBackendTexture similarly exposes GetGlTextureInfo() for OpenGL but no Vulkan image info getter or layout setter, confirming the pattern gap.

Generated P/Invoke layer contains gr_backendrendertarget_new_vulkan and gr_backendtexture_new_vulkan but no gr_backendrendertarget_get_vk_imageinfo, gr_backendrendertarget_set_vk_imagelayout, nor their texture equivalents. The C API shim does not yet expose these functions.

SKSurface has no GetBackendTexture() or GetBackendRenderTarget() methods, which the maintainer noted is another route to access image layout (via SkSurface::getBackendTexture() → GrBackendTexture::getVkImageInfo()).

keySignals.text: For Vulkan interopt we need to communicate the ImageLayout with Skia.
keySignals.interpretation: The Vulkan spec requires the consumer of a VkImage to know its current layout; without this, correct pipeline barriers cannot be inserted.

keySignals.text: What I think has changed is the way to do this and we need to use the new SkSurface::getBackendTexture() to get the GrBackendTexture and then call GrBackendTexture::getVkImageInfo() and/or use the GrBackendTexture::setVkImageLayout(). But, this all fails still because we don't have the initial SkSurface::getBackendTexture()
keySignals.interpretation: Maintainer confirmed the gap and identified the preferred upstream approach, but noted SKSurface::GetBackendTexture() is also missing.

keySignals.text: We don't have to use getBackendTexture, we instead create a surface using SKSurface.Create and keep a reference to the RenderTarget we pass in.
keySignals.interpretation: Reporter found a partial workaround: retain the GRBackendRenderTarget and call custom P/Invoke wrappers. Demonstrates the missing API is needed but feasible.

workarounds: Retain the GRBackendRenderTarget instance passed to SKSurface.Create and add custom P/Invoke bindings to gr_backendrendertarget_get_vk_imageinfo and gr_backendrendertarget_set_vk_imagelayout (as shown in the reporter's patch in the issue comments).
analysis.rationale: The issue is filed as [BUG] but is fundamentally a missing API — upstream Skia C++ supports getVkImageInfo/setVkImageLayout on GrBackendRenderTarget/GrBackendTexture, but these are not wrapped in SkiaSharp's C API shim or C# bindings. The GL equivalent (GetGlFramebufferInfo) exists, confirming this is a binding gap. Classified as type/feature-request because it requires new C API shim functions and new C# methods. The reporter provided a working patch as a proof of concept.

resolution.hypothesis: Adding gr_backendrendertarget_get_vk_imageinfo/set_vk_imagelayout to the C API shim and exposing them via GRBackendRenderTarget.GetVkImageInfo()/SetVkImageLayout() in C# would resolve the issue. Alternatively, exposing SKSurface.GetBackendTexture() as noted by the maintainer.

proposals.title: Add GetVkImageInfo/SetVkImageLayout to GRBackendRenderTarget
proposals.description: Add C API shim functions gr_backendrendertarget_get_vk_imageinfo and gr_backendrendertarget_set_vk_imagelayout (as shown in the reporter's patch), regenerate bindings, and add C# wrapper methods to GRBackendRenderTarget.

proposals.title: Expose SKSurface.GetBackendTexture() and GetVkImageInfo on GRBackendTexture
proposals.description: Follow the maintainer's preferred approach: expose SkSurface::getBackendTexture() as SKSurface.GetBackendTexture() and add GrBackendTexture::getVkImageInfo()/setVkImageLayout() bindings to GRBackendTexture.

resolution.recommendedReason: Most targeted fix matching the reporter's needs; reporter already provided a working C API patch as proof of concept.

actionability.reason: Valid feature request with a clear implementation path; reporter provided a proof-of-concept C API patch. A workaround exists via custom P/Invoke, so no blocker for current users. Needs maintainer decision on the preferred approach (render target vs surface backend texture).

actions.description: Apply feature-request, core bindings, and Vulkan backend labels
Acknowledge the request, confirm the gap, reference the reporter's patch, and note the preferred implementation approach
actions.comment:
Thanks for the detailed report and for providing a proof-of-concept patch!

This is a confirmed binding gap: `GRBackendRenderTarget` exposes `GetGlFramebufferInfo()` for OpenGL but there is no equivalent `GetVkImageInfo()`/`SetVkImageLayout()` for Vulkan. The upstream Skia C++ API supports these operations but they haven't been wrapped in SkiaSharp's C API shim yet.

As a **workaround** today, you can retain the `GRBackendRenderTarget` instance you passed to `SKSurface.Create` and add custom P/Invoke declarations as shown in your comment — this avoids modifying the SkiaSharp source.

We'll track adding first-class support for `GetVkImageInfo`/`SetVkImageLayout` on `GRBackendRenderTarget` (and/or exposing `SKSurface.GetBackendTexture()` as noted above).
